entry.title: Re: Changes In Funds Management with S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: That is correct. We have abolished the funds center and the commitment item as in OnPremise, we always suggested to use a 1:1 relationship between cost/funds center and commitment item/GL account. So now the structures have been streamlined in order to keep the 2 worlds in sync. We are not planning to change this in the cloud. Most feedback regarding this design has been very positive so far.

entry.title: In sap S4 Hana, not able to upload form template. Getting error form must not be changed in this sys
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm not able to upload form template after my changes in S4 Hana system. My form template starts with prefix 'ZF_*' instead of 'ZZ1_*'. I'm able to upload the form templates with ZZ1_* by successfully assigning it to package and transports using ‘Register Extensions for Transport’ app. But the form templates starting with 'ZF_*', I'm not able to change and not able to see in this app to reassign it to package. When I'm try to upload the form template getting error 'Form Template could not be updated' and Item ID 'ZF_*' must not be changed in this system. Could you please help me to figure out this issue.

 Thanks,

Mythili

entry.title: How to Implement Data Replication in SAP HANA Cloud for SAP CAP Microservices?
entry.content:
I’m currently working on an use case, an e-commerce application using SAP CAP (Java) in a microservices architecture. The application includes several services—product, price, stock, cart, order, user, and address—each of which has its own database in SAP HANA Cloud.

I’m exploring data replication strategies and would like to implement both master-master and master-slave replication across these services. Specifically, I’m seeking guidance on the following:

  1. How to configure master-master and master-slave replication in SAP HANA Cloud?
  2. What best practices or patterns should be followed to maintain data consistency and synchronization across services in a microservices architecture?
  3. Are there any SAP HANA Cloud-specific tools or configurations that would help with monitoring or optimizing the replication process?

Any insights, documentation, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

Abhinav

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate
entry.content:
Hello
I see that there are 7 practice questions that are given with the learning journey. I am reaching out to see if there are any more additional practice question that I can take before I sit for the exam.

Do I have to go a Prometric or similar site to give the exam? Will appreciate if you can give me some details on how the exam is proctered.

entry.title: Choosing the Right Path for SAP S/4HANA Transformation: Greenfield, Brownfield, or Bluefield?
entry.content:
transformation involves several key steps

  1. System Conversion: Moving from the old SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA, which requires a technical upgrade and data migration.
  2. New Implementation: Implementing SAP S/4HANA from scratch for organizations starting fresh or restructuring their business processes.
  3. Selective Data Transition: Combining elements of both system conversion and new implementation, selecting specific data or processes to move.

The transformation offers improved performance, real-time analytics, and simplified IT landscapes due to S/4HANA’s in-memory database and modern user experience through Fiori.

 

Greenfield Implementation                  Brownfield Implementation                 Bluefield Implementation

A fresh, new implementation of SAP S/4HANA from scratch.A system conversion that migrates an existing SAP ERP system to S/4HANA.A hybrid approach that blends Greenfield and Brownfield strategies.
Used when starting with new processes or overhauling old systems.Keeps existing customizations, configurations, and processes while upgrading to S/4HANA.Selectively retains and transforms existing processes and data.
Ideal for companies looking for full transformation.Suitable for organizations aiming to keep most of their current system setup.Often used to minimize risk, time, and cost by combining the best of both worlds.

comparing the pros and cons of Greenfield, Brownfield, and Bluefield implementation in SAP:

Approach             Pros                                                                       Cons

Greenfield- Complete process redesign and optimization.
- Full flexibility in implementing best practices.
- No legacy system constraints.		- Time-consuming.
- Higher costs due to full rebuild.
- Requires significant change management.
Brownfield- Faster implementation.
- Retains existing customizations and processes.
- Less disruption to current operations.		- Limited flexibility to adopt new processes.
- Potential migration of inefficiencies.
- May require extensive technical adjustments.
Bluefield- Combines benefits of Greenfield and Brownfield.
- Selective process and data transformation.
- Reduces cost and risk of full rebuild.		- Can be complex to manage.
- Requires careful planning to balance old and new.
- May not achieve full innovation like Greenfield.

 

I tried to keep this article simple and high-level, making it easy for everyone from novices to experts.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am Functional consultant and I identified as a person for this digital certification because I am a women and I am looking for a carrier change in SAP for carrier growth as SAP has high visibility in market. Also I am not able to afford the SAP certification cost. 

 

Regards

Pallavi

entry.title: Re: Companion for SAP Cloud Integration: Tools you love comes as a Docker Container
entry.content:
I know I'm a little late to the party, but it's really exciting to see this. I've recently begun to get more and more involved in CI work with my employer as we journey through a digital transformation. Having external tools to facilitate work and make the process smoother overall is very encouraging.

I've tried to access your website for the companion and some of the other tools you've so generously provided, and it looks like things aren't working correctly. I'd love to get more hands-on with these tools, but it seems like access is not open now.

Will it be opened up again soon?

Thank you in advance for any updates or assistance you can provide!!

entry.title: Re: Language based Email Triggering from IAS portal
entry.content:
Hi Sonia,

I think the problem from Michael is a problem with SF and  IPS/IAS. If you do not have EC Activated and you are using Api V2 in Target, the defautLocale form SF will send to IAS the language format "de_DE" and this will not work, since IAS need the language as "DE".

I have the same issue but we did not found any solution with SAP since all transformations are just for api V1.

We do not have any problems with LMS user only since LMS ist sending the language as DE.

Regards Cosmin

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate
entry.content:
Use this link to get many more practice questions: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-implementation-tools-and-methodology

Here is the link to know more on Activate: https://training.sap.com/certification/c_act_2403-sap-certified-associate--project-manager---sap-activate-g/
- From this link you can purchase exam vouchers

entry.title: Re: Mask in CJ20N - "Screen" field
entry.content: It is a standard field, it should be visible.

entry.title: Re: [CAP][CDS-TS] Powershell -> The term 'ts-node.exe' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet,..
entry.content: Inside the cds-ts-ps1 file, I commented the assignment of $exe=".exe" (row 8 in my version) and then it works. I don't need any npx commands as an alternative..

entry.title: How to prevent users from submitting data within the MDF object on certain days
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to solve a business request:

We have a custom MDF on the people profile for benefits, and we want employees to inform us if they would like to opt for certain benefits (in this case, insurance). We need time to prepare the necessary paperwork, so we want our employees to provide us with their decision on the benefit by the end of October (with an effective date of January 1st of the next year). I am able to set up restrictions based on the effective date, but we need the system to check the date when the record was created in the system.

For example, I should be able to create a record with an effective date of 01.01.25 on 26.10.24 (since the creation date is before the end of October), but on 01.11.24, I should not be able to create a record (because the creation date is after the end of October).

Additionally, we have a requirement to set up a similar rule for each month (e.g., users should only be able to add records until the 25th of the month).

I found this blog: SAP Community Blog, but in this case, the effective date of the record is taken into consideration, which is not what I need.

Is this even possible?

have a great day,

Anna

entry.title: Re: ME21N Create Purchase Order with reference to previous Purchase Order
entry.content: resolvido como?

entry.title: Re: Mass Export of Performance Forms in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: We use the Archive and Print feature within Classical Reports pages, however they have a very low threshold of how many documents you can export/archive at a time its very difficult to come up with a strategy that allows you to get the full set of documents

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Guided Experiences with SAP Build Process Automation and Work Zone
entry.content: Good Session.

entry.title: automatic replenishment task exceeding maximum qty of bin
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

we are replenishing at bin level using automatic replenishment. We have activated replenishment for storage type. we have maintained fixed bin assignment with min and max qty at bin level.

Testing: once pick task is created and confirmed. if stock level is less than min qty,  replenishment task is getting created automatically.  But the task is getting created for full max qty. it is not calculating qty to meet the max qty.

Eg: min qty:5 pc , max qty:10 pc

stock available:2 pc

replenishment task created: 10 pc.

But it should have been created for 8 pc.

Please recommend solution.

entry.title: RBP without employee central?
entry.content:
We are implementing Recruiting module in SuccessFactors. We don't have any employee central. My question is how I am going to assign the roles and authorizations to user without EC? The target groups can be managers or regional heads? I would appreciate any quick response. 

Thanks 

#RBP #RoleBasePermissions #Recruiting

Nirmala

Full Delivery is required VL150

What step am I missing?

entry.title: Strange RAP runtime behavior during validation on save
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am noticing a very strange behavior in my RAP application (Managed)

As per SAP help documentation - AUTHORITY-CHECK statement cannot be used in VALIDATION ON SAVE.

But I used AUTHORITY-CHECK statement in handler method of VALIDATION ON SAVE to validate user authorization, and not getting any error/behavior illegal statement exception.

Note:- There is not any authorization context is defined to disable authorization.

Do you know the reason, or is SAP help documentation not updated correctly?

entry.title: Re: How to convert Text to numeric format in Webi when I...
entry.content:
Define the following variable: 

v_Date:     =FormatDate(ToDate([Date]; "MMMyyyy dd"); "MMyyyy dd")

 (Note: [Date] object in my example = [OCALMONTH] object)

... 

I hope it helps

entry.title: SAP CAP Multi-tenant scenario with central app router and multiple services
entry.content:
Hi community,
I am working in a multi-tenant environment scenario where I have two multi-tenant services, and I want to create only one app-router that will be responsible to handle the incoming requests for both services. (I have already done this in a single tenant scenario).
I created my central app-router and the mta.yaml look like this:

 

_schema-version: "3.1"
ID: poc-launchpad
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
modules:
 # --------------------- APPROUTER MODULE ---------------------
  - name: poc-launchpad
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: .
    parameters:           
      disk-quota: 512M
      memory: 512M
      keep-existing-routes: true      
    requires:
      - name: poc-launchpad-approuter-auth
      # - name: poc-mt-customers-auth
      - name: poc-launchpad-destination
      - name: poc-launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
      - name: poc-launchpad-logging
    properties:
      TENANT_HOST_PATTERN: "^(.*)-XXX-dev-dev-poc-launchpad.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com"      
resources:
    # ----------------- DESTINATION --------------------------------------          
  - name: poc-launchpad-destination
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------   
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service    
    parameters:
      # tenant-mode: dedicated
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite
      config:
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        init_data:
          instance:
            existing_destinations_policy: update
            destinations:
              - Authentication: NoAuthentication
                Name: ui5
                ProxyType: Internet
                Type: HTTP
                URL: https://ui5.sap.com           
  # ---------------- APPLICATION LOGGING SERVICE ---------------
  - name: poc-launchpad-logging
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: application-logs
      service-name: poc-launchpad-logging-${space}
      service-plan: lite
  # ---------------- AUTHORIZATION SERVICE ---------------
  - name: poc-launchpad-approuter-auth
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    parameters:
      path: ./xs-security.json
      service-plan: application
      service: xsuaa
      config:
        xsappname: poc-launchpad-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: shared
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service          
    
  # - name: poc-mt-customers-auth
  #   type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service 

  # ---------------- HTML5 RUNTIME ---------------  
  - name: poc-launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: poc-launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
      service-plan: app-runtime
      service: html5-apps-repo

 

But unfortunately, when I enter to my app router it is not properly authenticating to my destination (the destination is created in the tenant sub-account). 

If I change my authorization service  poc-launchpad-approuter-auth that is not working, for the authorization service that I use for my application:

 - name: poc-mt-customers-auth

 type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service

it is able to access my application as expected. I think my problem is with the authorization service, I have read some documentation and I have found multi-tenant examples but all of them are with one mta.yaml that has the app-router, the services, and the web content in one file one application, but that is not my case.

any suggestion or example that address this scenario will be appreciated.

Thanks,

Tatiana F.

entry.title: Re: ITS Mobile Visual Editor Not Loading and throwing Err...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I had the same issue, it was related to some services that were deactivated.

Please run the following TCODE it should trigger a program to activate some standard services that are required for HTML Editor:
SIAC_PUBLISH_ALL_INT

It worked for me, I hope it will work for you too!

Is it possible to limit the company list to the country of the logged-in user when Initiating Onboarding via the Add New Recruit To Onboarding screen? Currently UK based Onboarding Admins can select Canadian based companies from this screen.

Regards

Frans

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

Hi gurus,

 

Is it possible to block recording of labor hours (transaction CO11N), arising from production order operations, through the user status of a WBS element?

What status business operation would this configuration be in?

Thanks in advance,

Elaine

entry.title: E2E migration from Oracle on-prem to SAP HANA Cloud using SAP Advanced SQL Migration & SAP HANA SDI
entry.content:
SAP Advanced SQL Migration tool is a database conversion tool that can convert non-SAP databases data models to SAP databases including SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA and also other SAP databases like SAP ASE, SAP IQ and SAP SQL Anywhere. Showing all the capabilities of this tool in a demo is something difficult but here I am giving a try at least for the most important features.

This demo video illustrates how the same Java application works perfectly well against Oracle 11G and SAP HANA Cloud after extracting the data model from Oracle, converting it to SAP HANA Cloud with SAP Advanced SQL Migration tool and migrating the data using SAP HANA Smart Data Integration (SAP HANA SDI). The demo also shows how SAP HANA Smart Data Integration capabilities allows to you activate real time replication from Oracle on-prem to SAP HANA Cloud.

Some details about the application and data model:

  • The application is a 2-tier (client-server) Java application managing a publications database, including entities like authors, titles, publishers, orders... etc.
  • The data model consist of 8 tables, some sequences, synonyms and some SQL objects like stored procedures, functions and packages containing around 2100 lines of Oracle PL/SQL code in including exception handling, %ROWTYPEs, (REF)Cursors, FOR-loops, cursors, built-in functions calls, subqueries, transactions...etc.

This demo video is clearly showing:

  1. Some basic details about the Java application.
  2. SAP Advanced SQL Migration is used to extract data model and SQL objects from the Oracle on-prem database and to convert them to SAP HANA Cloud (SQLScript dialect).
  3. The converted code provided by the migration tool is executed against SAP HANA Cloud using shell scripts automatically generated.
  4. Data from Oracle on-prem tables is migrated to SAP HANA Cloud using SAP HANA Smart Data Integration.
  5. Real time data replication is activated for one of the tables in Oracle.
  6. The java client application is disconnected from Oracle and connected to SAP HANA with no changes at all, the application works in the same way as oracle.
  7. Real time data replication is shown inserting data into a table in the Oracle on-prem system.

Watch the video and I hope you enjoy it:

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Tactical Sourcing: Maximizing Benefits from this Guided Buying Channel
entry.content:
Hi Brur,

Yes, this is possible.

In this case suppliers would be notified by email and can reply to the RFQ in two ways:

  1. In SAP Business Network by creating a free, standard account from the email notification or 
  2. Via email, if email bidding is enabled in the RFQ template. Remember that editing the RFQ template, for instance for this purpose, would require an SAP Ariba Sourcing license.

See Requesting Quotes from Unregistered Suppliers and Viewing and Editing the Default Guided Buying Template | SAP Help Portal for more details.

entry.title: SAP MM Scheduling Aggrement Output IDOC
entry.content:
In our company, short term and long term Forecast and Planning is done by non-SAP System. We have a requirement that non SAP-System should interface planned Qty with Planned Delivery Date by Supplier/Order Release Date/Site and SAP should save this information and send to the suppliers via EDI 830 format. Goods Receipt and Invoice shouldn't happen against the planned order, the planned orders should get cancelled after the Order Release Date in SAP. Also, planning system can change the Qty until it reaches the Order Release Date. SAP should recognise these changes and retrigger the EDI 830 message to supplier with version no and change indicator against the line being changed.

I am thinking to implement following solution in SAP. May I request the experts to review and advise me if I am on the right direction?  if not please provide the best solution? Also, is it possible to capture Version No and Change Indicator in this solution?

1. Create MM Scheduling Agreement (LP)

2. Generate Outbound IDOC DELFOR01

3. Map DELFOR01 to the EDI 830 Format.

Thanks

Zeya

I have created a FIORI APF (Analysis Path Framework) using APF configuration modeling and I am in need of guidance on how to create a Fiori tile for it so that users can easily execute it. This is my first time working with APF. I am able to execute it from APF configuration modeling and it is working fine, but I am unsure how to make it visible to the user.

entry.title: Re: Buddy App
entry.content:
Sad it went finished 😑
Can you throw in the areas you tried to cover while trying to build one?

Industries like Automobile, Insurance, etc will have restrictions with respect limiting the data on the mobility app
If SAP released a customized solution a Fiori App version or a product - would be a fun way of communication
There are new joiners, especially interns who swipe out and like to spend time to network, the HR team can track the swipe out timings and sent out a notification on the app saying "Hey! times up". The features can be many. These apps or products are a boom to New joiners varying from interns to experienced but new joiners to the company
Someone does not need to search for a flyers / maps to load the building map

entry.title: Re: Store attachments from Standard Fiori apps in Archive...
entry.content: Harmonized Document Management is what you should be looking at. The list of apps supporting HDM has been steadily growing and can be found in SAP Note 3220119 - Business applications in SAP S/4HANA that have adopted Harmonized Document Management (HDM)

entry.title: Re: 2H2024 - Remove the disable option for the new traini...
entry.content: There isn't this option. When "Hidden" is selected in the "New Learning Experience switch default setting", users will see the new experience without the ability to switch to the old one

entry.title: Multi-tenantcy - is it possible to create a destination in a tenant subaccount using the mta.yaml
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I want to be able to create a destination in a tenant sub-account using the mta.yaml, I was able to create it in a single tenant scenario like this:

# ----------------- CONTENT DESTINATION  ---------------------------      
  - name: XXX-destination-content
# ------------------------------------------------------------------   
    type: com.sap.application.content
    build-parameters:
      no-source: true
    requires:
     - name: XXX-destination
       parameters:
        content-target: true
     - name: srv-api
     - name: XXX-auth
       parameters:
        service-key:
          name: XXX-auth-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
         destinations:
          - Name: XXX-api
            Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
            TokenServiceInstanceName: XXX-auth
            TokenServiceKeyName: XXX-auth-key
            URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
            WebIDEEnabled: true
            WebIDEUsage: odata_gen
         existing_destinations_policy: update

but I have not found a way to do it for  tenant account from the mta.yaml it creates the destination in the provider account.

 

Thanks,

Tatiana F.

entry.title: Can I connect DEV and PRD DMC instances to one PCo?
entry.content: What would be the connection settings required to connect a single PCo to DEV and PRD DM instances? We are using PCo 15.5.4.38 to connect to DMC DEV and working fine. We are about to activate PRD but cannot get PCo Connected to DM PRD. Is there a recommended architecture including SCC and PCo Machine to achieve this connection?

entry.title: Re: Error: Cannot find module '@sap/hana-client' in CAPM Project
entry.content: Did you find an answer for this by chance?

entry.title: How SAP Business AI and Large Language Models are shaping the future of SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Terry Penner and Jürgen Butsmann discuss the latest developments in SAP Business AI for SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).  The conversation focuses on how Artificial Intelligence is evolving at SAP, with particular attention to large language models (LLMs) and their growing application in SAP cloud ERP and SAP BTP.

Listen to the podcast: Spotify | Apple Podcasts

Topics discussed:

Part 1: Evolution of AI and Large Language Models (LLMs)

  • Latest developments in the AI market
  • SAP’s ERP strategy evolution for AI
  • Latest solution architecture updates

Part 2:  Differentiating the AI solutions in SAP cloud ERP

  • What is Joule
  • Differentiating AI offerings
  • How can AI add value to a business
  • Partner role with SAP Business AI

Part 3: Cloud ERP AI Priorities

  • SAP cloud ERP AI development priorities
  • SAP’s Business AI  scenario priorities

This blog is a follow-up to AI for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP: deep-dive discussion

About the speakers:

Jürgen Butsmann is part of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Marketing team responsible for AI in the context of SAP S/4HANA, finance and digital supply chain. Jürgen has been with SAP for more than 26 years.  He is a recognized expert for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP .

Terry Penner is part of the SAP BTP marketing team for Business Applications, focused on SAP BTP for SAP S/4HANA. He has more than 23 years of technical and business experience in the SAP platform and analytics, including working directly on hundreds of customer implementations.

Part 1: Evolution of AI and Large Language Models (LLMs)

Latest developments in the AI market

Terry: In today's discussion, we'll explore how Artificial Intelligence for SAP S/4HANA and the SAP Business Technology Platform is evolving. Jürgen, what new developments have occurred in the AI market since we last spoke?

Jürgen: The evolution of technology continues unabated. We're observing an increase in services such as document services and advanced large language models (LLMs). The LLMs we see today are notably more fact-based, not just designed for entertainment purposes like the early iterations of ChatGPT, but for fact-oriented applications like those seen with Aleph Alpha. Additionally, there have been multiple iterations and diverse models emerging tailored to specific needs. We've also noticed a decline in pricing, which makes these AI services increasingly attractive and accessible in the market.

Terry: Absolutely. We've also witnessed significant legal developments, with content owners like The New York Times and others looking to withdraw their material from large language models, underscoring the importance of having robust and compliant data sources for these models.

SAP’s ERP strategy evolution for AI

Terry: How has SAP's ERP strategy for AI evolved?

Jürgen: Our strategy has evolved significantly, placing a more substantial emphasis on an AI-first approach across SAP. This shift means a lot of new ideas and pre-made implementations for our customers. We've taken a two-pronged approach in our investments. First, we're enhancing end-user productivity by integrating digital assistants into our systems, with Joule being a primary component. Although still early in deployment, these tools signify a shift from traditional graphical user interfaces to more intuitive digital assistant interactions.

Further confirming this direction, our CEO, Christian Klein, anticipates that in ten years, most system users will interact with digital assistants rather than traditional interfaces. Our focus also extends to natural language interactions within these systems, fostering intelligent activities and responses.

 

Secondly, we are concentrating on enhancing end-to-end processes. While we continue to enhance user interaction and productivity on the front end, significant efforts are directed towards optimizing large-scale processes, particularly within enterprise service management. This holistic approach ensures not just improvements in individual functionalities but also the acceleration of end-to-end process flows, all underpinned by advanced AI and generative AI technologies. This dual focus aligns with our commitment to transforming business processes through innovative AI applications.

Latest solution architecture updates

Terry: What are the latest updates to SAP's AI solution architecture since then?

Jürgen: One major change is the ongoing development of Joule. Initially, Joule had a rather rigid architecture that was not very flexible and did not support LLMs. This has changed. We have introduced the capability to create prompts using LLM support, which is a priority that has helped increase acceptance of this digital system and co-pilot for everyday work. Additionally, we've improved context sensitivity—knowing where you are in your system and what steps you are processing. This is a key differentiator from other co-pilots on the market and allows us to integrate responses that feel less artificial and more contextually aware not just to speak about integrating proprietary documents into the context of the Business Processes.

Furthermore, we continue to develop its extensibility. We've opened possibilities for customers to tailor the co-pilot to perform functions specific to their needs.

Terry: And regarding extensibility, that’s a significant area where SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) collaborates with the ERP team by supplying developer tools and experiences, such as the vector engine within SAP HANA, to support these functionalities—it's a joint effort.

Part 2:  Differentiating the AI solutions in SAP cloud ERP

What is Joule?

Terry: We’ve spoken quite a bit about Joule. Could you clarify exactly what Joule is?

Jürgen: Essentially, Joule serves as an interface for natural language commands within our system architecture. It acts as an entry point where users can interact with the system to trigger functions or retrieve necessary business process information. While Joule leverages AI technologies, its use doesn’t alter the inherent capabilities of our AI. It fits seamlessly into our system, making those use cases distinct and noteworthy. Ideally, Joule simplifies user interactions by providing a natural, conversational interface with the system. While our systems could operate without Joule, using it enhances the user experience, making interactions more engaging and straightforward.

  

Differentiating the AI solutions in SAP cloud ERP

Terry: What's the difference with SAP Business AI? How should customers differentiate potential AI offerings?

Jürgen: The top priority for SAP Business AI is to provide clear and measurable value to customers. Before using AI scenarios, there must be a reasonable and measurable return on investment. The focus is on implementing AI in SAP systems without the need to change generic functionality, where the system's context details can be used to address processes more effectively.

The reliability of AI use cases is a major focus, based on fact-based foundation models whenever possible. All AI-assisted processes undergo an ethical check and are supported by the data security of SAP Business AI architecture.

We are also continuing to refine our pricing approach and evaluating if we will continue using current AI units or shift to different technologies in the future. Customers consider usage, potential value add, costs, and investments when determining the break-even point for their use cases. Moreover, customers expect our AI solutions to be user-friendly.

Terry: Adding to that, not all AI use cases deliver sufficient value for application. It's crucial to concentrate on scenarios with high-quality underlying data linked to large language models. For example, one effective use of AI I've observed involves searching through support cases and providing recommendations to new team members, enhancing the search experience and improving how information is interpreted and suggested.

How can AI add value to a business

Terry: How would you explain to a customer how AI can add value to a business?

Jürgen: When considering how AI supports business processes, the user's connection to the system is paramount. Ideally, this happens through a digital co-pilot, like Joule in our case. Users interact with Joule by posing questions that prompt queries to a large language model, which in turn provides responses. However, large language models may lack specific business process details since those are unique and not universally predefined, leading to potentially incomplete answers. 

 

To address this, we might extend our architecture to incorporate calls to the ERP system or access other proprietary data, ensuring no sensitive business information is exposed to potentially vulnerable cloud environments. We balance accessibility with security by using a vector database to locate and integrate the right business-specific data from outside the large language model's scope.

As users submit human language requests, these are processed through the digital system and converted into technical prompts by a large language model. These prompts trigger the vector engine to retrieve the necessary information. The returning data can then be refined further by the large language models, which are all deployed securely within our system environment to prevent data leakage.

The data retrieval process benefits from enhancements such as semantic similarities and pattern recognition to continuously improve response accuracy. Once processed, the information is delivered back to the user, completing the cycle and delivering the value we aim for with our AI-enabled systems.

This systematic approach ensures that AI not only supports but also enhances business processes effectively while maintaining data integrity and security.

Terry: So, we could describe Joule as the front-end experience, distinct from the backend LLM that powers the AI functionalities.

Partner role with SAP Business AI

Terry: What role do partners play in this space?

Jürgen: Firstly, our partners have a deep understanding of our customers. It's crucial that partners are well-versed in our setup, strategy, architecture, pricing, and other elements that shape how we envision utilizing these services. We leverage our partners to create scalable solutions that precisely address specific customer needs. They are instrumental in implementing individual projects that tackle unique business challenges at the customer sites. Our partners have a proven track record of handling such use cases effectively.

Part 3: AI Extensibility and SAP BTP

SAP cloud ERP AI development priorities

Terry: What are some of the other AI development priorities at SAP cloud ERP, and how is SAP BTP supporting those AI scenarios?

 

Jürgen: We're integrating various technologies beyond what we've already discussed, like our work with live language models. For example, merging our capabilities with Microsoft Copilot offers expanded possibilities for enhancing natural language interactions. SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) and the AI Foundation are pivotal in anchoring these flexibilities. This integration allows us to broaden our scope and reinforce the support we provide for cloud ERP AI scenarios.

SAP’s Business AI scenario priorities

Terry: What business scenarios are central to SAP's Business AI focus?

Jürgen: Our focus isn't narrow, but we do see significant interest particularly in the finance sector. Currently, we're engaging extensively with businesses, customers, and partners to pinpoint key priorities specific to finance. Our approach begins by assessing what immediate actions we can take and then contemplating more visionary possibilities for the future. For example, one idea is the automatic creation of forecast scenarios based on historical data within our systems. This capability could enhance management, strategy, and decision-making meetings significantly, even without all finance experts gathered at one table. Additionally, there are numerous other aspects of finance where AI can play a transformative role.

Terry: We will link to some specific use cases within the podcast notes. Thank you, Jürgen, for joining us and sharing your insights into AI for cloud ERP and the business technology platform. It's been enlightening.

Jürgen: Thank you for having me. I hope our discussion helps people understand better where we are now and where we are headed with our technology.

[ Note:  This blog was adapted from the podcast transcript by an SAP system using Azure OpenAI–gpt-4 ]

Key links:

  • Four ways to infuse business-ready, trusted AI into your processes
  • SAP BTP for S/4HANA
  • SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Business AI

Read more in this series:

  • Artificial Intelligence (AI) for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP: A deep dive
  • SAP S/4HANA Data Migration and Master Data Management Best Practices with SAP BTP
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensions with SAP Build Best Practices: An Expert Roundtable
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensions and Clean Core with SAP BTP - A Best Practices Conversation

entry.title: Getting a new error on Legal Entity in Position with 2024 2H Release
entry.content:
Noticed today that when I tried to change a legal entity on a position, I am getting this error message: 

You can’t change Legal Entity for the given position because employees are assigned to it.
 
Likewise, I looked out our JobInfoToPositionSync business rule and it now show this:
 
This was not happening before the release.  Anyone else having this happening?  I didn't see anything in release notes when I search for Legal, Entity, Company, or Sync about this.
 
Thanks,
Andi

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and everyone! I’m Meenakshi, I have 14+ years of experience in the IT space. I’m a student of Post Graduate Program in Data Science and Business Analytics, aiming to expand my technical skills.

With a background in predictive analytics, AI/ML integration, and healthcare technology, I’m passionate about leveraging digital skills to solve real-world problems. I’m excited about the SAP Digital Skills Initiative as I believe it will further enhance my knowledge and help me contribute more effectively to innovative projects. I look forward to the opportunity to grow and learn with this community.

Thank you for considering my participation!

entry.title: Re: Does MDG supports s4/HANA as a target system?
entry.content: The answers are generally provided from the SAP MDG on SAP S/4HANA perspective. With the SAP S/4HANA 2023 release, the cloud-ready mode in MDG was implemented.

entry.title: How to set custom URL for Hybris media items
entry.content:
At present, the hybris media items are accessible by a direct URL which uses the host name of our API service endpoint.


We currently we have following config.
media.default.storage.strategy = cloudAzureBlobStorageStrategy


media.default.url.strategy = localMediaWebURLStrategy


If we have to assign a custom host and URL to access the media items directly from external system, what are the steps we need to follow?


Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set custom URL for Hybris media items
entry.content: go to your custom host DNS system to create a rule which is redirecting www.XXXXXX.com to api-prd.ams.corp.readyrefresh.com.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2: What’s in it for the Utilities Industry?
entry.content: Excellent blog in order to describe insights and practical tips to optimize operations of our Utilities industry. Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere - Operator and values DAC
entry.content: @Steve_Letza  I have re-uploaded first seveal images, please have a look and free to let me know if you have any questions.

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere - Hierarchy DAC
entry.content: @SCN according to SAP's guideline, the best practise is to create a separate space and define DAC table in that space, and only share view access to the other business space(FI/HR and etc), Please find the screenshot from SAP guideline:

entry.title: Re: Transitive attribute in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni 

Ref your below comment: 

Please specify that this works only with analytic models (SAC front end and BO 4.3 sp4 with an OLAP connection), even if during modeling of view you can specify associations.

Every other BI tool that access to Datasphere's database through ODBC can not see analytic models (missing privileges to read column views in the main schema of a space)

This is actually not quite true, I have tried to use PowerBI to connect to underlying HANA DB of Datasphere, and able to see the transitive attribute of the analytical model (present as a table), behind the scene, SAP created multiple tables to support the analytical model.

entry.title: We want to know how to bulk register CBC Setting 102922:Define Costing Sheets
entry.content:
I am trying to set up indirect allocation for cost centers using CBC setting 102922:Define Costing Sheets. I am running into a problem: there are about 1,200 items, and it would take a considerable amount of time to set up the CBC settings manually one by one. If you know of an application that can register CBC settings in bulk, I would appreciate it if you could let me know.

Specific requests for bulk CBC registration

  1. I want to register”Costing Sheets” ”Costing Sheet Rows" "Base" "Overhead Rate" "Credit" all at once without clicking the screen.
    There are 1,119 records (Costing Sheets) that need to be registered, and I have to open each of the Costing Sheet Rows, Base, Overhead Rate, and Credit each time and register them, which is very inefficient.
  2. The paste function of "Costing Sheets" can only be used up to 27 rows, so I would like to know how to increase the number of rows that can be pasted.

entry.content:

How to start working on user-exit MBCF001 and MB_DOCUMENT_BADI?

pls advise step by step.

 

Thsnks in advance.

entry.title: Re: 上传日记账分录如何正确添加字段
entry.content:
Hi

请参考如下链接，

Upload General Journal Entries: FAQ | SAP Help Portal

以上内容中的: How can I add custom fields in this app using the Coding Block business context?

请注意，自定义字段是指应用可扩展性中的自定义字段，而不是 SAP 为您提供的用于向模板添加新列的缺省字段。有关上载一般日记账分录应用的 SAP 定义字段，请参阅Adding Field Columns in Template | SAP Help Portal

Kind Regards,

Lucy

Need your help to fix it...

entry.title: Sales Order Type:CBAR operation（Refund Type：1 Replacement Material）
entry.content:
Hi Expert !!
I create a return order using sale order type CBAR with the following details:

  • Follow-Up Act：0001 Receive into Plant
  • Next Follow-Up：0021 Send Back to Customer
  • Refund Type：1 Replacement Material
  • Refund Code：P Create Reaplacement Order

In this case, I want to manage the returned inventory as customer assets.
(I want to manage it with an inventory value of ￥0 .)

How can I make this happen?


Soma

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud: Creating roles in BP master data for supplier
entry.content:
When creating a BP master data for our supplier, there are two roles: purchasing supplier and financial supplier.

If the supplier is a software organization or an organization who provides service (non-physical products), is it necessary for us to create purchasing supplier role information for this supplier?

Business Rule Framework plus (BRFplus) | SAP Help Portal

Lucy

entry.title: Settlement Periods for Service Contracts
entry.content:
Hi Expert !!

I created service contract in S/4 HANA Public Cloud . 
 ・Contract Start: 2024/11/1
 ・Contract End: 2025/10/31

In this case, I would like to operate the Settlement Periods from the 16th of the current month to the 15th of the following month.
The image is as follows.

 

Can you increase the number of options for Settlement Periods? (e.g. "From the 16th of the current month")

 

Soma

entry.title: Cannot open Microsoft Outlook instance; check that Microsoft Outlook is installed

Hi All

Please advise how to solve as suddenly our client cannot send out Customer Statement via Email to Customer in version 10 PL2105.

SAP Note 836051 mentioned in this thread has been removed.  

Solved: Cannot open Microsoft Outlook instance - SAP Community

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Certification for Financial Accounting
entry.content:
Hello,

There are two certification for the beginners/associates: C_TS4FI_2023 and C_S4CFI_2408.

Once you register for the certification exam, you must look at the topic area on which different weitages are allocated. You need to prepare for each of these areas and answer minimum threshold number of questions correctly in order to clear the certification.

Rfere to this link for details, hope it opens up for you.

Thank you!

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Connecting and Exposing API Endpoint from SAP Cloud Integration-(Part 2) || Connect, Expose & Te
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there a way to use OAuth 2 directly on the service instance of api portal access (Client ID and Client Secret with token URL). The token generates successfully in the postman using Service key credentials however when this is used to call the API (here i am trying to verify this token by using OAUTH Policy) it fails with "Invalid access token"

Is there an option to call the API with Service key credentials instead of Application key/Application secret and verify it as well using the OAUTH Policy.

Appreciate any directions.

entry.title: Re: Why WOCR is not getting selected in WO instead only D...
entry.content:
Did you activate the log for the WO creation? That will help you to figure out what the problem is.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: 5 Major Generative AI Innovations Unveiled at SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content: If you’re a consultant working with SAP Gen AI, this video provides end to end setup on development: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Miz9fZWC5mI

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenantcy - is it possible to create a destinati...
entry.content:
I am not sure if you can do this via mta.yaml becuase mta.yaml is used to deploy your app in provider account. Tenant is not available until subscription. So it has to be done on subscription. 

Sample Code: https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-multitenant-saas/blob/main/code/srv/srv/utils/automator.js 
(createSampleDestination method)

entry.title: Re: TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Content with Transport Management Service (TMS) a
entry.content: @Shekhar Your user is missing the ImportOperator role in Cloud Transport Management application. You can refer to more on setting up role collections in the help guide of TMS.

entry.title: IW32 how to disable the Header data tab in the second screen and disabling all fields?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Are we allowed to disable or gray out all fields of the Header data tab of transaction code IW32? If yes, would you know what is the user exit or badi or enhancement spot for this? I saw a lot in the forums but all of them did not even stop at my break point when I pressed IW32 and entered the correct order number.

Thanks guys.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi David,

I came across this wonderful opportunity to get my SAP certification. I have been working as S/4 Hana FI associate mainly for testing and small level tasks like script running. This opportunity will provide me the means to get certified and get my growth in the field. As I am a new immigrant, putting aside some bucks for certification is very hard right now.

Again thank you for this amazing opportunity.

Regards,
Malik Sohaib Qamar

entry.title: CL SALV aggregation doesn't work
entry.content:
The aggregation was not working on my main program, so I decided to write another dummy program to see if it works there or not. Turns out, it doesn't. I have gone through every discussion and cannot seem to find the solution. The total doesn't appear at the end of the column which technically, it should. 

Here is the code:

 

REPORT z_test_salv_aggregation.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_data,
         menge TYPE i, " Using integer for quantity
       END OF ty_data.

DATA: it_test      TYPE TABLE OF ty_data,
      wa_test      TYPE ty_data,
      lo_alv_table TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
      lo_agg       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_aggregations,
      lo_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list.

* Sample data
wa_test-menge = 10. APPEND wa_test TO it_test.
wa_test-menge = 20. APPEND wa_test TO it_test.
wa_test-menge = 30. APPEND wa_test TO it_test.

* Create the ALV Table
TRY.
    cl_salv_table=>factory(
      IMPORTING
        r_salv_table = lo_alv_table
      CHANGING
        t_table      = it_test
    ).
  CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lx_msg).
    WRITE: / 'Error creating ALV table:', lx_msg->get_text( ).
    RETURN.
ENDTRY.

* Get the Functions object and activate all functions
lo_functions = lo_alv_table->get_functions(  ).
lo_functions->set_all( 'X' ).

lo_agg = lo_alv_table->get_aggregations(  ).
  TRY.
      CALL METHOD lo_agg->add_aggregation
        EXPORTING
          columnname  = 'MENGE'
          aggregation = if_salv_c_aggregation=>total.
    CATCH cx_salv_data_error cx_salv_not_found cx_salv_existing INTO DATA(lx_error).
  ENDTRY.

* Display the ALV Table
lo_alv_table->display( ).

entry.title: Re: Automatic Hire
entry.content:
Hi,

Anyone have implemented 'Automatic Hire" functionality in recruiting stage. Could you please share some doc and the business rule.

I have configure the rule and i don't see any changes in MPH for that candidate. Do we need to map any fields from rec to MPH for this feature to work?

Thanks,

Rohini

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Yazan Albarbarawi, and I am currently working in Jordan. I hold a master's degree in accounting and work for a company that utilizes the SAP system in its operations. I am particularly interested in SAP FICO, and my goal is to obtain a certification in this module to enhance my expertise and contribute further to my company's success. I look forward to becoming an expert in SAP and advancing my career in this field.

I look forward to engaging with the community and learning from all of you!

Best regards,
Yazan Albarbarawi

entry.title: Re: How to include service charge and special price updat...
entry.content: Hi Martine , It is well noted your reply and really grateful to you for helping us . Yes you are corrected when i am coping the code I had missed types "1" and "3" . After adding those types as well only the Jason file work properly , Thanks for advising on that and the other information been provided . But actually my problem is when i am going to return a receipt , the service charge also automatically adding to the same return receipt as well . Because when returning a receipt service no need to be added .   So is there any way to fulfill this requirement not to add service charge for return receipts . Your kind respond is greatly appreciated . Best Regards, Tharindu.

entry.title: Re: Define additional Links other than default links provided inside More Link popover,
How to Access SAP Cloud ALM Demo Server via Trial Environment?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to access the SAP Cloud ALM demo server, but it seems that my user ID does not currently have access to the trial server.

Could anyone please guide me on how to gain access to the SAP Cloud ALM demo server or let me know if there are any specific steps I need to follow to set it up? Any insights or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Pooja Arjun
SAP Cloud ALMSAP Integration Strategy #SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Cons unit 122200 is not assigned to cons group CITY i...
entry.content: Please check/Maintain the consolidation unit is Tcode - CX1X. Hope this will help you to assign the cons unit to correct group cons unit.

entry.title: Re: Define additional Links other than default links provided inside More Link popover,
entry.content: Hello, since there are no changes in documentation, can we conclude that this option is still unavaliable for Fiori elements? Need to add a custom link to F2173 app
